description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 4 hrs 13 mins coding, with a daily average of 3 hrs 5 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and the most-used languages were TypeScript, Java, Markdown, and JSON. No new GitHub commits, pull requests, or repositories were recorded in the data for this period.
